creator: dsh@vlink.ru
text:
How-To-Repeat: 
diff -Nru qico.orig/Makefile qico/Makefile
--- qico.orig/Makefile	Tue Mar 20 02:13:39 2001
+++ qico/Makefile	Wed Apr  4 12:20:06 2001
@@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	qico
-PORTVERSION=	0.48.4
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	0.48.5
 CATEGORIES=	comms
 MASTER_SITES=	http://lev.serebryakov.spb.ru/download/0.48/
 
diff -Nru qico.orig/distinfo qico/distinfo
--- qico.orig/distinfo	Sun Feb 18 02:26:23 2001
+++ qico/distinfo	Wed Apr  4 12:21:08 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (qico-0.48.4.tar.gz) = a426094bbb25711ddc919b769a08475e
+MD5 (qico-0.48.5.tar.gz) = 0879986b7e1794c2ec5afa9cf6646904
